hero.description: LoyaltyOS gives local businesses the same retention tools used by global brands — fully branded, automated, and ready in days

problem.label: The Problem
problem.heading: Your best customers walked out the door.
problem.item0_title: No system to track who's coming back
problem.item0_body: Paper punch cards get lost. Spreadsheets don't send reminders. You're losing regulars silently, one missed visit at a time.
problem.item1_title: You're competing with chains that invest millions in loyalty
problem.item1_body: Enterprise chains and global brands retain customers with sophisticated loyalty technology worth millions. Local businesses get nothing. Until now.
problem.item2_title: Every inactive customer is revenue you already paid for
problem.item2_body: You spent money to acquire them. Every day they don't return, your acquisition cost gets more expensive.

features.label: The Solution
features.heading: Turn every visit into a reason to come back
features.subheading: LoyaltyOS automates what the best brands do manually
features.item0_body: Your customers use YOUR app with YOUR logo. Not ours. White-label loyalty that looks like you built it from scratch.
features.item1_body: When a customer goes 25 days without visiting, LoyaltyOS automatically sends personalized campaigns to bring them back.
features.item2_body: See your best customers, busiest hours, top products, and at-risk members — all in one dashboard built for business owners.
features.item3_body: Fully customizable points per dollar, tier levels (Bronze, Silver, Gold, Platinum), and reward catalog. Your rules, your brand.
features.item4_body: Reach members the moment it matters. Birthday rewards, double-points campaigns, reactivation sequences — all automated.
features.item5_body: Challenges, multipliers, leaderboards and dynamic offers that keep customers engaged. Earn double points, complete goals, unlock exclusive rewards.

howItWorks.label: How It Works
howItWorks.heading: Ready in days, not months
howItWorks.step0_title: We set up your branded app
howItWorks.step0_body: Share your logo and colors. We configure your loyalty program, set your points rules, and launch your custom member experience.
howItWorks.step1_body: Share a QR code. Customers scan, register, and start accumulating points on every visit. No app store needed — it's a PWA.
howItWorks.step2_body: Our engine tracks visit frequency, detects at-risk customers, and fires personalized campaigns — without you lifting a finger.

testimonials.label: Social Proof
testimonials.heading: What business owners say
testimonials.item0_quote: We recovered 40 clients in the first month who hadn't visited in over 30 days. The campaigns literally paid for the subscription in week one.
testimonials.item1_quote: My customers actually use this. I've tried loyalty apps before and nobody signed up. With LoyaltyOS the QR code gets scanned every day.
testimonials.item2_quote: The dashboard showed me Wednesday at 7pm is my busiest slot. I never knew that. Now I run double-points on Tuesdays to fill the gap.

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.heading: Simple pricing, serious results
pricing.footer: All plans include a 14-day free trial. Cancel anytime.

faq.label: FAQ
faq.heading: Frequently asked questions
faq.item0_q: Do my customers need to download an app?
faq.item0_a: No. LoyaltyOS is a Progressive Web App (PWA). Customers access it directly from their browser and can add it to their home screen in one tap — no App Store required, no friction for your customers.
faq.item1_q: Can I customize the points rules and rewards?
faq.item1_a: Yes. You set the points-per-dollar ratio, define tier thresholds (Bronze, Silver, Gold, Platinum), and create your own reward catalog. Customers earn at your pace, redeem on your terms.
faq.item2_a: Your customers see your business name, your logo, and your colors — not LoyaltyOS. It looks and feels like a loyalty app you built yourself, at a fraction of the cost.
faq.item3_q: How quickly can I get started?
faq.item3_a: Most businesses are fully live within 24 to 48 hours. We handle the entire setup — you just share a QR code with your first customer.
faq.item4_a: Yes. We use bank-level encryption in transit and at rest, database-level isolation between all business accounts, and we never sell or share your customer data under any circumstances.
faq.item5_a: Yes. Cancel from your dashboard at any time. No long-term contracts, no cancellation fees. Your data remains available for export for 90 days after cancellation.
faq.item6_q: What happens when my free trial ends?
faq.item6_a: You'll receive an email reminder 3 days before your trial ends. If you don't add a payment method, your account is paused — not deleted. Your data stays safe for 30 days.

finalCta.heading: Your next loyal customer is already in your store.

footer.tagline: Turn every visit into a reason to come back.
footer.copyright: © 2026 LoyaltyOS, LLC. West Palm Beach, FL

contact.heading: Book a Demo
contact.subheading: Tell us about your business and we'll set up a personalized demo within 24 hours.
contact.emailInvalidError: Please enter a valid email address

contact.successBody: Thanks for reaching out. We've received your request and will contact you within 24 hours to schedule your demo.
contact.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again or email us at support@loyaltyos.com

pricingPage.label: Pricing
pricingPage.subheading: Start free for 14 days. Cancel anytime.

aboutPage.label: About
aboutPage.heroHeading: Built for the businesses that build communities
aboutPage.heroSubheading: Local businesses are the backbone of every neighborhood. We built LoyaltyOS because they deserve the same retention tools used by global brands — without the $100K price tag.
aboutPage.missionHeading: Level the playing field for local businesses
aboutPage.missionP1: Enterprise chains invest millions in loyalty engineering teams. Global beauty and retail brands have entire divisions dedicated to retention science. Your local business? A punch card and a prayer.
aboutPage.missionP2: LoyaltyOS changes that. We pack enterprise-grade loyalty infrastructure into a platform that any business owner can set up in a day — no technical knowledge required.
aboutPage.value0_body: Business owners shouldn't need a developer to run a loyalty program. If it's not simple, it won't be used.
aboutPage.value1_body: Your customers should never know LoyaltyOS exists. Every touchpoint should feel like it came from you.
aboutPage.value2_body: Every customer record, every transaction, every email — it's yours. We are custodians, not owners.
